title: Risk Palate
promise: What risks would you actually accept? A risk menu across five life domains — financial, reputational, relational, existential, and creative.
description: 10 risk scenarios (2 per domain) with a three-option appetite scale (Never / Sometimes / Always accept). Result renders a risk menu highlighting your appetite per domain, with where it helps and where it needs a guardrail.
ogDescription: What risks would you actually accept? 10 scenarios, ~3 min. Private by design.
